title: BTA Basket Container
description: This mod add an interface for other mods to interact with basket inventory.
body:
# BTA Basket Container

This mod make possible for other BTA mods like ***BTA CC Tweaks*** or ***Signal Industries*** to interact with BTA Vanilla Basket

It works internally by implementing to the `TileEntityBasket` the `Container` interface like Chest do with a special adapter that make it recognize like a chest of 1728 slots that can hold only one item.

If you see with those modes or any others there are some items that are not taken or have been deleted by this mod. Please open an Issue and I will see what I can do to fix this.
